basic_details.job_title: KFWCCF Public Relation Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Karnataka Forests Wildlife and Climate Change Foundation (KFWCCF)
basic_details.short_information: Karnataka Forests Wildlife and Climate Change Foundation (KFWCCF) Public Relation Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of KFWCCF. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the KFWCCF Public Relation Officer Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for KFWCCF Public Relation Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://kfwccf.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: KFWCCF Public Relation Officer Recruitment 2026 - Overview
KFWCCF Public Relation Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the KFWCCF Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for KFWCCF Public Relation Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://kfwccf.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: KFWCCF Public Relation Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the KFWCCF PRO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Public Relation Officer (PRO) post is 18th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the PRO position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Public Relation Officer (PRO) post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 70,000.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the PRO post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate degree in any discipline to be eligible for the Public Relation Officer (PRO) position.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it, and send it to the official address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the KFWCCF PRO recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the PRO post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Public Relation Officer (PRO) post announced by KFWCCF.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Public Relation Officer (PRO) post is contractual.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website of KFWCCF?
faq.answer: The official website of Karnataka Forests Wildlife and Climate Change Foundation (KFWCCF) is https://kfwccf.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the PRO role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves experience-based shortlisting followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article.
